title: Russet and Fluffy Potato Gratin
description: A rich and creamy potato gratin featuring russet and fluffy potatoes, perfect as a side dish for any meal.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine sliced potatoes and enough cold water to cover.
Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
In a large skillet, melt 2 tablespoons of butter over medium heat.
Add sliced potatoes to the skillet and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until they start to brown.
Transfer the potato mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a separate saucepan, combine grated cheese, heavy cream, salt, and black pepper.
Stir over low heat until the cheese is melted and the sauce is smooth.
Pour the cheese sauce over the potatoes in the baking dish.
Top with remaining 2 tablespoons of butter.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
